meta.source: drmaxs.com June 2026 + Roadmap Decision Memo v2
meta.note: Prices verified for core 4 SKUs; null = capture from site. waterBased=true concepts are gated by the preservative-promise decision (Memo §3).

skus.name: Eczema Relief Cream
skus.rationale: The bridge SKU: 60% of eczema presents in year one, 85% by age 5; serves velocity AND duration; OTC monograph route already proven with Diaper Ointment; proceeds on every decision branch
skus.renderPrompt: Tall slender cream-colored cosmetic tube with a white flip-top cap, standing upright on its cap. Label on the tube body reads 'Dr. Max's Eczema Relief Cream' with 'colloidal oatmeal, calendula' below in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Belly Balm (Pregnancy)
skus.rationale: Moves acquisition earlier (Earth Mama/Mustela wedge); registry-season friendly; anhydrous
skus.renderPrompt: Wide shallow round salve tin with a smooth brushed-metal lid. Cream paper label band reads 'Dr. Max's Belly Balm (Pregnancy)' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Baby Cleansing Oil
skus.rationale: Fills the wash gap WITHOUT breaking the preservative promise; daily-bath replenishment
skus.renderPrompt: Small amber glass dropper bottle with a black rubber pipette cap. Cream paper label reads 'Dr. Max's Baby Cleansing Oil' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Oatmeal Bath Soak
skus.rationale: Anhydrous bath ritual; clinically on-trend; pairs with Eczema Cream
skus.renderPrompt: Wide squat glass jar with a polished brushed-metal screw lid. Cream paper label reads 'Dr. Max's Oatmeal Bath Soak' with 'colloidal oatmeal & chamomile' below in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Solid Lotion Bar
skus.rationale: Post-bath lotion occasion in promise-compatible solid format
skus.renderPrompt: Small round metal tin with a brushed silver lid. Cream paper label reads 'Dr. Max's Solid Lotion Bar' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Gentle Hair & Body Wash
skus.rationale: GATED: highest-velocity SKU in category (Tubby Todd Regulars anchor) but requires preservative-promise refinement
skus.renderPrompt: Soft-touch cream-colored plastic pump bottle with a deep indigo pump head and flip-top cap. Label reads 'Dr. Max's Gentle Hair & Body Wash' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Boo-Boo Balm
skus.rationale: Toddler minor-injury ritual; pairs with Dr. Animals book in Big Kid Bath Box; price at/above Salve-All per-oz to limit cannibalization
skus.renderPrompt: Small round metal tin with a brushed-metal lid. Cream paper label reads 'Dr. Max's Boo-Boo Balm' with 'calendula & yarrow' below in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Calendula Bubble Bath
skus.rationale: GATED: toddler bathtime is the retention ritual, but format requires preservative decision
skus.renderPrompt: Soft plastic pour bottle with a flip-top cap, cream-colored body. Label reads 'Dr. Max's Calendula Bubble Bath' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

skus.name: Chamomile Hair Detangler
skus.renderPrompt: Slim cream-colored plastic spray bottle with a clear trigger nozzle. Label reads 'Dr. Max's Chamomile Hair Detangler' in deep indigo serif type. Soft diffused studio lighting. Product object only.

scenarios.name: Phase 1 — All Branches
scenarios.thesis: SKUs that pay off regardless of which decision branch the owned-data pull (N1/N2/N3) selects: the eczema bridge and the pregnancy acquisition wedge. Proceed now while data settles the rest.

scenarios.name: Velocity — Own the Daily Routine
scenarios.thesis: Year one is the highest-frequency consumption window in childhood. Complete the daily routine (cleanse, soothe, protect) in promise-compatible formats and capture share-of-routine. Selected if N1 low / N3 high (customers migrate to Salve-All; multi-use thesis working).

scenarios.name: Duration — Grow With the Customer
scenarios.thesis: Extend relationship past age one with toddler condition/ritual SKUs. Selected if N1 low / N3 low (churn wall real, multi-use thesis aspirational). Requires replenishment mechanics (subscriptions) first.

decisionInputs.name: Post-12mo repeat rate
decisionInputs.question: Of customers whose first order contained a 0-12m SKU, what share order again after month 12, and what do they buy?

decisionInputs.name: Self-purchase share
decisionInputs.question: What share of revenue is self-purchase vs gift (ship-to != bill-to, gift notes, gift boxes)?

decisionInputs.name: Salve-All migration
decisionInputs.question: Among baby-SKU first-buyers, what share later purchase Salve-All or adult/family SKUs?
